name: Western Areas Limited
description: Western Areas Limited was an Australian-based mining company primarily focused on the exploration, development, and production of high-grade nickel sulphide. Headquartered in Perth, Western Australia, the company operated significant assets including the Forrestania Nickel Project. Western Areas was recognized for its expertise in underground mining and its contribution to the Australian resources sector. In June 2022, the company was acquired by IGO Limited, integrating its nickel assets into IGO's broader portfolio of metals critical to the global energy transition and battery storage technologies.
